units.note: All dimensions/positions in fen. Scene scale: 1 fen = 16.5 mm.

components.role: Raised earthen-core masonry platform carrying the entire timber frame.
components.source: No published dimension in corpus — sized for visual context only

components.role: U-shaped low altar holding the 14 extant Tang statues; the column-free interior exists to serve it (右绕礼佛 circumambulation ring).
components.source: ZHANG2022

components.role: Stone plinth isolating the column foot from ground moisture.
components.source: YZFS 卷三 造柱础之制 「方倍柱之径」

components.role: Corner column with 生起 rise of +2 fen — gentler than the YZFS rule, a documented deviation.
components.source: ZHANG2022
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS 卷五: 「至角则随间数生起，三间生高二寸」(would be 60mm)
components.note: Three square columns differ markedly from the round columns — likely NOT original 782 members (different period). Render with conjecture flag; their diameter/height inferences are unreliable.

components.role: Perimeter eave column; the hall has no interior columns, freeing the floor for the altar.
components.source: ZHANG2022
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS 用柱之制 (余屋 range)

components.role: Tie beam linking the column tops into a ring; Nanchan has no pupai-fang above it — an early-period trait.
components.source: YZFS 卷五 (member present in building; section unrecorded in corpus)

ZHANG2022 (caliper + point-cloud)
components.role: Capital block collecting the whole bracket set's load into the column.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS: 栌斗 32×32 fen, height 20 fen (耳8平4欹8)
components.note: Smaller than Fashi spec in all dimensions — documented deviation.

annotation.desc_zh: 位于柱头的方形垫块，是斗拱体系的基座，用来将上层斗拱的荷载均匀分散到柱子上。
annotation.desc_en: Square capital block at the column head. Distributes bracket loads uniformly to the column.

components.source: ZHANG2022 (caliper + point-cloud)
components.name_zh: 角华栱（第一跳，足材加宽）
components.role: Load-bearing projecting arm widened to 11 fen — the builders bent the modular system for mechanics, centuries before Ming/Qing practice.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS: 「每跳之长，心不过三十分°」 — jump 1 complies
components.note: Corner set simplified: diagonal arm only (v1); full 转角铺作 composition deferred.

annotation.desc_zh: 水平向外伸出的构件，承载上层斗拱。加宽至11分以增加强度，说明工匠为结构力学做出的主动调整。
annotation.desc_en: Horizontal projecting arm. Widened to 11 fen for structural strength—builders adapted the modular system for mechanics.

components.source: ZHANG2022 (caliper + point-cloud)
components.role: Projecting arm stepping the eave load outward; 偷心造 — no transverse arm rides this jump.
components.note: Corner set simplified: diagonal arm only (v1); full 转角铺作 composition deferred.

annotation.desc_zh: 继续向外扩展，逐级阶跃式地延伸斗拱的支撑范围。宽度收窄，形成层级递进的视觉效果。
annotation.desc_en: Upper projecting arm continuing the outward extension. Width reduces to create visual hierarchy.

components.source: ZHANG2022 (caliper + point-cloud)
components.role: Transverse arm in the wall plane carrying the 柱头枋 tiers.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS spec: 62 / 72 / 92 fen
components.note: 70 fen — equals the ling gong, breaking the usual early pattern (YZFS: 62).

annotation.desc_zh: 垂直于前后方向，位于墙面平面内。与华栱垂直交叉，形成网格式结构，增强横向稳定性。
annotation.desc_en: Transverse arm in the wall plane. Perpendicular to hua-gong, creating grid-like bracing.

components.source: ZHANG2022 (caliper + point-cloud)
components.role: Capital block collecting the whole bracket set's load into the column.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS: 栌斗 32×32 fen, height 20 fen (耳8平4欹8)
components.note: Smaller than Fashi spec in all dimensions — documented deviation.

components.role: Transverse arm in the wall plane carrying the 柱头枋 tiers.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS spec: 62 / 72 / 92 fen
components.note: 70 fen — equals the ling gong, breaking the usual early pattern (YZFS: 62).

annotation.desc_zh: 垂直于前后方向，位于墙面平面内。与华栱垂直交叉，形成网格式结构，增强横向稳定性。
annotation.desc_en: Transverse arm in the wall plane. Perpendicular to hua-gong, creating grid-like bracing.

components.source: ZHANG2022 (caliper + point-cloud)
components.role: Outermost transverse arm receiving the 撩檐枋 that carries the eave.
components.note: 70 fen, not shorter than the nidao gong (YZFS expects 72>62 the other way).

annotation.desc_zh: 最外层的斗拱臂，直接支撑檐角。在唐代，令栱与泥道栱同等长度，打破了后来规则的严格比例关系。
annotation.desc_en: Outermost bracket arm supporting the eave edge. In Tang dynasty, ling-gong and nidao-gong were equal length.

components.note: 70 fen — equals the ling gong, breaking the usual early pattern (YZFS: 62).

annotation.desc_zh: 垂直于前后方向，位于墙面平面内。与华栱垂直交叉，形成网格式结构，增强横向稳定性。
annotation.desc_en: Transverse arm in the wall plane. Perpendicular to hua-gong, creating grid-like bracing.

components.source: ZHANG2022 (caliper + point-cloud)
components.role: Outermost transverse arm receiving the 撩檐枋 that carries the eave.
components.note: 70 fen, not shorter than the nidao gong (YZFS expects 72>62 the other way).

annotation.desc_zh: 最外层的斗拱臂，直接支撑檐角。在唐代，令栱与泥道栱同等长度，打破了后来规则的严格比例关系。
annotation.desc_en: Outermost bracket arm supporting the eave edge. In Tang dynasty, ling-gong and nidao-gong were equal length.

components.source: ZHANG2022 (caliper + point-cloud)
components.role: Capital block collecting the whole bracket set's load into the column.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS: 栌斗 32×32 fen, height 20 fen (耳8平4欹8)
components.note: Smaller than Fashi spec in all dimensions — documented deviation.

annotation.desc_zh: 位于柱头的方形垫块，是斗拱体系的基座，用来将上层斗拱的荷载均匀分散到柱子上。
annotation.desc_en: Square capital block at the column head. Distributes bracket loads uniformly to the column.

components.source: ZHANG2022 (caliper + point-cloud)
components.role: Load-bearing projecting arm widened to 11 fen — the builders bent the modular system for mechanics, centuries before Ming/Qing practice.
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS: 「每跳之长，心不过三十分°」 — jump 1 complies

annotation.desc_zh: 水平向外伸出的构件，承载上层斗拱。加宽至11分以增加强度，说明工匠为结构力学做出的主动调整。
annotation.desc_en: Horizontal projecting arm. Widened to 11 fen for structural strength—builders adapted the modular system for mechanics.

components.source: ZHANG2022 (caliper + point-cloud)
components.role: Load-bearing projecting arm widened to 11 fen — the builders bent the modular system for mechanics, centuries before Ming/Qing practice.

annotation.desc_zh: 继续向外扩展，逐级阶跃式地延伸斗拱的支撑范围。宽度收窄，形成层级递进的视觉效果。
annotation.desc_en: Upper projecting arm continuing the outward extension. Width reduces to create visual hierarchy.

components.role: Main transverse beam spanning the full 600-fen depth in one leap — possible only because the hall is small; carried on the lengthened inward bracket jumps.
components.source: Span: ZHANG2022 grid; section: YZFS 卷五 用梁之制
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS 卷五 「四椽栿广两材两栔」

components.name_zh: 驼峰（1975 年修缮拆除，推想复原）
components.role: Bearing block between the four-rafter beam and the ping beam. The 1974–75 repair removed the originals; this is a flagged guess.
components.source: QI1980 via ZHANG2022 — ridge-area members removed in repair

components.name_zh: 驼峰（1975 年修缮拆除，推想复原）
components.role: Bearing block between the four-rafter beam and the ping beam. The 1974–75 repair removed the originals; this is a flagged guess.

components.role: Upper beam spanning the middle two rafter-bays; the scissor braces rise from its ends to the ridge.
components.source: Span: ZHANG2022 purlin grid; section: YZFS 卷五
components.yzfs_ref: YZFS 卷五 「平梁广两材一栔」

components.role: Pair of inclined braces carrying the ridge purlin directly — the archaic Tang solution, kept alone after the 1975 repair removed the dwarf-post assembly.
components.source: QI1980 via ZHANG2022 — current config post-repair; original ridge structure uncertain; rise 130 fen itself conjectural (propagated)

components.source: Position: ZHANG2022 grid; member: YZFS 卷五 (section unrecorded in corpus)

components.role: Longitudinal purlin; rafters bear on it. Spacing 150 fen ×4 across the depth.
components.source: Height depends on conjectural rise 130 (QI1980 repair); spacing ZHANG2022
components.note: Position horizontal: measured grid. Height: propagated conjecture (V09 — must NOT be normalized to YZFS 1:3).

components.role: Longitudinal purlin; rafters bear on it. Spacing 150 fen ×4 across the depth.
components.source: ZHANG2022 — 150-fen spacing; mid depression 10 fen measured (rule: 13)
components.note: Height uses measured depression on the conjectural chord — mixed certainty, noted.

components.role: Longitudinal purlin; rafters bear on it. Spacing 150 fen ×4 across the depth.

components.role: Tiled roof plane (rafters + sheathing + tile), derived as a surface between purlin lines.
components.source: Pre-repair rafters were short (clearly not Tang appearance); 2340mm is the 1974–75 restoration estimate from platform/column-height ratios. Explicitly unusable as design evidence — MUST render in conjecture color. [QI1980]

components.name_zh: 山面檐口（1975 年复原出檐）
